'''bahoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coagitator|coagitator]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-h-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coagitator|coagitator]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bahoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæheseth|bæheseth]] || [[word:bæhesej|bæhesej]] || [[word:bæhesesh|bæhesesh]] || [[word:bæhese|bæhese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bahohosoth|bahohosoth]] || [[word:bahohosoj|bahohosoj]] || [[word:bahohososh|bahohososh]] || [[word:bahohoso|bahohoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bahosoth|bahosoth]] || [[word:bahosoj|bahosoj]] || [[word:bahososh|bahososh]] || [[word:bahoso|bahoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bahofsoth|bahofsoth]] || [[word:bahofsoj|bahofsoj]] || [[word:bahofsosh|bahofsosh]] || [[word:bahofsof|bahofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bahosotho|bahosotho]] || [[word:bahosojo|bahosojo]] || [[word:bahososho|bahososho]] || [[word:bahosoko|bahosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bahosoth|bahosoth]] || [[word:bahosoj|bahosoj]] || [[word:bahososh|bahososh]] || [[word:bahoso|bahoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bahosothol|bahosothol]] || [[word:bahosojol|bahosojol]] || [[word:bahososhol|bahososhol]] || [[word:bahosokol|bahosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bahosothotho|bahosothotho]] || [[word:bahosojojo|bahosojojo]] || [[word:bahososhosho|bahososhosho]] || [[word:bahosoko|bahosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bahosothon|bahosothon]] || [[word:bahosojon|bahosojon]] || [[word:bahososhon|bahososhon]] || [[word:bahosokon|bahosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bahosothoro|bahosothoro]] || [[word:bahosojoro|bahosojoro]] || [[word:bahososhoro|bahososhoro]] || [[word:bahosokoro|bahosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
